items.title: Chester appoint manager with same name as boss of rivals Wrexham
items.summary: Chester appoint former Altrincham boss Phil Parkinson on a two-year deal.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: ILT20 CEO explains why they shifted to November-December period for Season 5
items.summary: The International League T20 (ILT20) has advanced its Season 5 schedule to November-December 2026, aiming for a cleaner global T20 window. This strategic shift, building on Seas...
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Rohit puts on a 'full display' on return, but is it too late to salvage MI's season?
items.summary: In his absence, MI struggled to find the right overseas-Indian balance, ended up weakening their batting, and slipped to near the bottom on the points table
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
